entities.name: jetbrains-index

activation.configSource: Pi settings.json (jetbrainsIndex key) with mcp.json fallback

behaviors: Injects minimal IDE tool guidance into system prompt with targeting guidance (prefer file+line+column, symbol fallback, fileHint for JS/TS)
Loads JetBrains connection config from Pi settings.json (jetbrainsIndex key) with fallback to mcp.json
Blocks any tool call when IDE/index becomes unavailable and aborts the agent run
Syncs entire project at turn start and reports only newly introduced diagnostics
Nudges toward IDE move refactoring on mv/git mv inside CWD
Exposes internal JetBrainsService layer with 17-tool catalog, TOON helpers, and MCP tool metadata retention
Provides target-resolution module (target-resolver.ts) that resolves symbol or location targets to canonical file/line/column for semantic tool wrappers

Registers first-class Pi wrapper tools (13 tools) on session start when IDE is available: ide_find_file, ide_search_text, ide_find_symbol, ide_find_definition, ide_find_references, ide_refactor_rename, ide_find_implementations, ide_find_super_methods, ide_type_hierarchy, ide_call_hierarchy, ide_diagnostics, ide_move_file, ide_file_structure
Mutation tools (ide_refactor_rename, ide_move_file) perform one whole-project sync after successful IDE mutation and do not run diagnostics
